content: Mulch JSONL files live in .mulch/expertise/<domain>.jsonl. Domain summaries cached in .mulch/summaries/<domain>.md. Summaries regenerated when JSONL mtime is newer than summary mtime.

description: mulch prime fails with JSON parse error if JSONL records have wrong schema fields
resolution: Each type requires specific fields: convention->description, pattern->name+description, decision->title+rationale, failure->description+resolution, reference->name+description

description: ListDomains() was parsing mulch status header lines as domain names
resolution: Only parse lines containing 'records' substring, extract word before colon

content: IsSummaryStale checks .mulch/expertise/<domain>.jsonl not .mulch/domains/ - correct path is expertise/
Mulch records must be created using proper CLI commands to ensure correct schema compliance and ID generation
